proposals.old_exact: Thus, we conclude the court did not err in denying Tim Hamburger child support from May to September 2021. IV[¶14] Tim Hamburger states the district court erred by denying him an evidentiary hearing. He does not support his statement with any law or argument. We conclude he waived this issue on appeal. See Riemers v. Grand Forks Herald, 2004 ND 192, ¶ 11, 688 N.W.2d 167 ("[A] party waives an issue by not providing supporting argument and, without supportive reasoning or citations to relevant authorities, an argument is without merit.").
proposals.new_exact:
Thus, we conclude the court did not err in denying Tim Hamburger child support from May to September 2021.

IV

[¶14] Tim Hamburger states the district court erred by denying him an evidentiary hearing. He does not support his statement with any law or argument. We conclude he waived this issue on appeal. See Riemers v. Grand Forks Herald, 2004 ND 192, ¶ 11, 688 N.W.2d 167 ("[A] party waives an issue by not providing supporting argument and, without supportive reasoning or citations to relevant authorities, an argument is without merit.").
